comments:
Halogen Rendering Target

Renders Hydrogen Elements to Halogen HTML for use in Halogen applications.
This bridges the pure Element abstraction to Halogen's reactive runtime.

## Event Handler Conversion

Hydrogen event handlers are converted to Halogen's event system:

| Hydrogen                  | Halogen                        |
|---------------------------|--------------------------------|
| `onClick msg`             | `HE.onClick \_ -> msg`         |
| `onInput f`               | `HE.onValueInput f`            |
| `onChange f`              | `HE.onValueChange f`           |
| `onKeyDown f`             | `HE.onKeyDown (f <<< key)`     |
| `onSubmit msg`            | `HE.onSubmit \_ -> msg`        |

## Usage

```purescript
import Hydrogen.Render.Element as E
import Hydrogen.Target.Halogen as TH
import Halogen.HTML as HH

myComponent :: forall w. HH.HTML w MyAction
myComponent = TH.toHalogen (E.button_ [ E.onClick Click ] [ E.text "Click me" ])
```

## Integration with Hydrogen Compounds

This enables using Hydrogen's 96 Element Compounds in Halogen applications:

```purescript
import Hydrogen.Element.Compound.Button as Button
import Hydrogen.Target.Halogen as TH

render :: State -> HH.HTML w Action
render state = TH.toHalogen $ 
  Button.button
    [ Button.onClick SubmitForm
    , Button.backgroundColor brand.primary
    ]
    [ E.text "Submit" ]
```

declarations.comments: Convert an Element to Halogen HTML with default options
